workflow.name: Workflows Steering Live
workflow.goal: Seed an active ongoing workflow that operators can use for manual Workflows steering, add-work, pause/resume, and input-packet observation while the harness verifies clean settlement.

parameters.intake_contract: Keep enough ongoing intake work active for manual steering observation before the workflow settles back to pending.

actions.goal_template: Keep manual steering observation item {index:02d} active long enough for Workflows UI capture.
actions.acceptance_criteria_template: Publish a triage packet and leave enough activity for steering observation item {index:02d}.
actions.notes_template: Observation item {index:02d} exists so operators can manually test Workflows steering and add-work flows during a live run.
